text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ugh! I couldn't get first place!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: And I was so close! This is so frustratin'!
choice_data_list: We'll get first place next time.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Where's your ambition?! I was aimin' for first
out there!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: And my results are tied real tight to how much clout you get! So ya better toughen up, 'kay?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, let's head back 'n review things, yeah?!
'Cause next time's da one! I'm winnin' for sure!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I swear on da White Lightnin' name,
I'm winnin' gold next time!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
There's no time for mopin'! Let's jump straight
into trainin'!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: 'Cause I never wanna feel this way again!
